conservative.name: Devastating Swing
conservative.requirements: Strength 6+. Must be engaged with the target. If you have a weapon equipped or an enormous appendage, you may be within close range.

success.description: You take a wide swing at your opponents, flattening your target and causing others to scatter. The attack inflicts normal damage
As above, and you may hurl your target to a new location within close range, where he lands prone

boon.description: The target gains the Staggered condition for 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: If armed with a weapon, your enormous strength shatters it into splinters

sigmarsComet.description: All enemies engaged with you are knocked back, disengaging automatically

reckless.name: Devastating Swing
reckless.requirements:
Used by: Giants, Trolls
Engaged with target, or within close range if melee weapon equipped

success.description: The towering creature takes a wide swing at its opponents, flattening its target and causing others to scatter. The attack inflicts normal damage

boon.description: The target suffers from the Staggered condition for 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: The attacker loses his weapon, throwing it a close distance away from himself

sigmarsComet.description: All characters engaged with the target suffer 1 fatigue
